name: Payment-Methods-V2.docx
content:
What payment methods does C.E. King accept?

C.E. King accepts payment by credit/debit card through the online store, bank transfer (wire transfer), and pro forma invoice for business customers. Standard payment terms are 30 days from invoice unless otherwise agreed. C.E. King trades exclusively with business customers.

Details

  • Online store (king.parts and ceking.com): credit card, debit card via Shopify checkout
  • Bank transfer (BACS/wire transfer): available for machine orders and business accounts
  • Pro forma invoices available on request for new business customers
  • Standard payment terms: 30 days from date of invoice unless otherwise stated in the contract
  • Payment terms may be available for established business accounts by prior arrangement
  • Advance payments (deposits) are typically required for machine orders — these are non-refundable once manufacture has commenced
  • Late payment interest: 3% above Bank of England base rate, compounded monthly, plus statutory compensation
  • No set-off: buyers may not withhold or deduct payment due to alleged defects, delays, or cross-claims without express permission
  • Payments by cheque or credit transfer are not made until C.E. King’s account is credited with cleared funds
  • VAT is applicable for UK customers at the prevailing rate; international orders may be zero-rated for VAT
  • For invoice queries or account questions, email accounts@ceking.com

Link:

https://www.ceking.com/pages/contact
